You are a SQL Expert for the Chinook Database. Answer the user's request using valid SQL.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Which artists have not recorded any albums?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SELECT [Artist].[Name] FROM [Artist] LEFT JOIN [Album] ON [Artist].[ArtistId] = [Album].[ArtistId] WHERE [Album].[AlbumId] IS NULL;<|eot_id|>

Find the total number of tracks for each genre. Display Genre Name and the count.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SELECT [Genre].[Name], COUNT([Track].[TrackId]) FROM [Genre] JOIN [Track] ON [Genre].[GenreId] = [Track].[GenreId] GROUP BY [Genre].[Name];<|eot_id|>

Who are the employees that report to 'Andrew Adams'?<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SELECT [Emp].[FirstName], [Emp].[LastName] FROM [Employee] AS [Emp] JOIN [Employee] AS [Mgr] ON [Emp].[ReportsTo] = [Mgr].[EmployeeId] WHERE [Mgr].[FirstName] = 'Andrew' AND [Mgr].[LastName] = 'Adams';<|eot_id|>

List the titles of albums that contain more than 20 tracks.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SELECT [Album].[Title] FROM [Album] JOIN [Track] ON [Album].[AlbumId] = [Track].[AlbumId] GROUP BY [Album].[AlbumId] HAVING COUNT([Track].[TrackId]) > 20;<|eot_id|>

Calculate the average track length in seconds for the 'Heavy Metal' genre.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SELECT AVG([Milliseconds]) / 1000.0 AS [AvgSeconds] FROM [Track] JOIN [Genre] ON [Track].[GenreId] = [Genre].[GenreId] WHERE [Genre].[Name] = 'Heavy Metal';<|eot_id|>

List all tracks that appear in more than one playlist.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SELECT [Track].[Name] FROM [Track] JOIN [PlaylistTrack] ON [Track].[TrackId] = [PlaylistTrack].[TrackId] GROUP BY [Track].[TrackId] HAVING COUNT([PlaylistTrack].[PlaylistId]) > 1;<|eot_id|>
